refnamediv.refpurpose: in a tsmat associated to a model, set all residuals to 0

listitem.para: * db = the original tsmat where all series corresponding to a residuals in the input model are set to 0

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION In a tsmat associated to a model, sets all residuals to 0 (useful for estimation purposes).

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
